page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.3xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external storage solutions, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance consistently in the average tier. It achieves a single-core stress-ng score of 1893.38 and a multi-core score of 11663.11. Memory bandwidth is robust, reaching 642.92 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 78.47 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads. In database-centric tests, it processes 11.97 million Redis SET operations per second and scores 5826.28 on PassMark database operations. For lightweight machine learning, it handles 135M model prompt processing at 1077.69 tokens per second, though performance drops to a weak 24.29 tokens per second for 7B models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r7t.3xlarge offers a balanced profile for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable compute performance, while the 96.0 GB memory capacity makes it highly suitable for in-memory databases like Redis, caching layers, enterprise applications, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.

Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. Benchmark results show solid mid-tier performance, with 11.97 million Redis SET operations per second, a PassMark database score of 5826.28, and a multi-core stress-ng score of 11663.11. Memory bandwidth is robust, reaching 642.92 GB/sec for cached small-block reads. The instance delivers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, making it highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring predictable compute performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7t.3xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 96 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server with dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for demanding database and caching workloads.

96.0 GB of system memory (8.0 GB per core)
Delivers 11.97 million Redis SET operations per second
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
